bits.premise: Apocalypse scenarios can be ranked like personal preferences.

lines.text: What's up?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: What's up?

lines.text: What's up?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Now, I came out here.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm a little angry, but I'm not angry with y'all.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I don't like the motherfuckers that's outside, so I came up
lines.label: setup

lines.text: with a few ways to destroy the world, and I only got a
lines.label: setup

lines.text: minute to do so.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The first one would be for you religious motherfuckers.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I want whoever you believe in, Jesus, Muhammad, whoever.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I hope you come so that way the rest of us
lines.label: setup

lines.text: can be out here screaming like, holy shit.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: You can't say that shit because God is here.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: The second way, you already got Donald Trump in there
lines.label: setup

lines.text: doing this thing, working on Israel.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We working on them bombs.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That would be funny, but fuck that.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: We're living that one.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Now, the third way, fucking Thriller.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I want my goddamn zombies.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I've been watching The Walking Dead,
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I've been practicing my motherfucker shit.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Michael getting ready to come out.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I'm going to see that shit.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I want to live it.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: The fourth way that I,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because it could be anything,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: you guys, I could drop a bomb of peanuts in here
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and drop half of you motherfuckers.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: The fourth way that I believe that we deserve it,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'cause Donald Trump said it's true,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: he's goddamn aliens.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: We're already here.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Thank y'all, I'm T. Austin.
lines.label: fluff
